summary: Completed comprehensive testing of HappyCo Concierge V1 Phase 5 implementation. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend UI components tested successfully. Landing page parity structure, rich login page with demo account cards, admin shell navigation, route protection, and root redirect functionality all working as expected.
passed_tests: Backend authentication endpoints (admin/manager/resident login, session management, logout)
Admin role diagnostics access and non-admin 403 protection
Landing page loads with hero section, stats grid, insight panel, environment badge
Login page renders with email/password form and three demo account cards
Admin login flow successfully authenticates and redirects to dashboard
Admin shell loads with sidebar navigation and topbar components
All sidebar navigation items work (Dashboard, Properties, Providers, Tenants, Analytics, Settings, Diagnostics)
Manager and resident logins authenticate but redirect with proper error message
Root URL redirect for signed-in admin to /app/admin/dashboard
Admin route protection blocks unauthenticated access
User menu functionality with correct user details and logout
Placeholder admin pages render correctly with route information
Diagnostics page remains functional from sidebar navigation
